title: Infection-Control Policy Updated Before Execution
scenario: A clinical transfer is authorized before an infection-control policy update, but the update changes execution requirements before transfer.
initial_state: The transfer was authorized under the prior infection-control policy.
execution_boundary: The transfer is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution must conform to the currently applicable infection-control policy.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because current infection-control policy no longer admits the transfer.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when infection-control policy changes before execution.
clinical_action: Execute transfer under outdated infection-control policy
